instruction: Add skimmed milk to a bowl.
Whisk in olive oil until creamy.
Cook the rice and season the chicken.
Slice the vegetables and warm the dressing.
Assemble the bowl and finish with lemon.
Boil the pasta and chop the vegetables.
Sauté everything with garlic and olive oil.
Combine the yogurt oats and milk.
Cook the rice and prepare the vegetables.
Finish with lemon and olive oil.
Warm the tortillas and slice the fillings.
Whisk the eggs and chop the vegetables.
Cook the omelette and add feta.
Simmer chickpeas with coconut milk and curry paste.
Stir in spinach and warm the rice.
Sear the beef and vegetables quickly.
Stir in broth and mushrooms slowly.
Fill tortillas with chickpeas and avocado.
Top with tomato basil and olive oil.
Cook the rice and scramble the eggs.
Stir fry the shrimp and vegetables.
Soften the vegetables in olive oil.
Simmer lentils in broth until tender.
Cook the chicken and warm the tortillas.
Bake until the potatoes are tender.
Boil the pasta and wilt the spinach.
Toss with feta tomato and garlic.
Soak the oats with yogurt and milk.
Top with honey and serve cold.
